note: Strict identity/gaze/style regeneration batch for the active 20-character roster. Inputs use verified face-and-complete-hair crops. Review candidates only. pado and peanut were removed from the game on 2026-07-01.
negativePrompt: copying the style anchor identity, copying JDD face or hair, generic invented face, identity drift, changing hair length, changing bangs, changing hair part, front-facing head, front-facing torso, camera-facing eyes, centered pupils, cross-eyed gaze, looking at viewer, clean flat cartoon, cute smooth cel-shading, simple mobile-chibi, glossy 3D, photoreal pasted face, soft under-rendered face, low detail, baseball jersey, readable letters, text, number, logo, watermark, card frame, border, UI, color fringe, extra limbs, two characters, cropped body, cropped weapon, edge contact
globalStyle: Reference-preserving CHARACTER battle master for SLAY THE MONSTARZ. TWO images are provided. Image 1 is a FACELESS armor crop used ONLY as the rendering-style reference: dense hand-painted dark-fantasy brushwork, thick dark outlines, gritty painterly texture, dramatic high-contrast shadows, chibi combat proportions, and flat chroma green. Image 2 is a VERIFIED enlarged identity image containing the character's complete face and complete outer hairstyle and is the ONLY face-and-hair identity reference. Copy the visible face silhouette, cheek volume, jaw, eye proportions, eyebrows, nose, mouth, hair mass, hairline, fringe, side strands, part, and exact hair length from Image 2. Do not beautify, genericize, or substitute another face. Integrate the face into exactly the same dense, high-contrast painterly finish as the armor; the face must not look smoother, cleaner, more realistic, more anime-like, or more 3D than the body.
globalConstraints: STRICT RIGHT-FACING COMBAT PROFILE. Use a true side view or strongly right-facing 3/4 view: nose, chin, chest, hips, knees, feet, and weapon all point screen RIGHT. Pupils sit at the RIGHT edge of the visible eye and focus on an off-screen enemy to the right; the far eye is barely visible. Never look at the viewer. One full-body character head-to-toe, large and centered with generous safe padding; all hair, armor, limbs, and weapon fully inside the canvas. Perfectly flat uniform solid #00ff00 background with no floor, cast shadow, gradient, texture, reflection, letters, or numbers.
